I went to a Giants-Eagles game, and growing up as a Giants fan, I'm wearing my Giants varsity jacket, and I swear I'm getting spit on, all the Philadelphia fans.
Like, I'm covered in loogies, people from above me in the benches that are just spitting on me.
And so, I was just like, I hate Philly.
I just, they're the worst people in the world.
My wife and I, we moved to school.
We went to a Knicks 76ers game.
And it's a Pennsylvania school.
They took us out on a bus.
The 76ers fans were giving us  the entire time.
The entire time.
Because I was wearing my Knicks stuff.
And so, I just, they're the worst, You must be so happy.
This, this could be the, this could be the year, you know?

This could be the, I stopped watching for like five years, after they got rid of Chris Stubbs, and Phil Jackson, everything, forget this, I was like, this sucks, so, but now we're good, and so I'm back, watching it, we're loving it, it's crazy.
Alright man, well I got a hop, but yeah, I'll just email you, do you guys have like a Slack connect, like can we just set up a channel or something?
Yeah, I'll do it after this call, send it to you over LinkedIn, and then you can hit me up over there, alright?
Cool man, alright, good to do it, alright, talk later.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX.ai and James Hanzimanolis' agency for content creation and social media management.](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jason is interested in leveraging James' expertise to scale content creation for GrowthX.ai and potentially their clients](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [James offers two main packages: 10 posts/month for $2,000 or 20 posts/month for $3,000](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Both parties are open to a pilot program to test the collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Discussion of tools and processes for content ideation and social media management](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

## Topics

### Current Roles and Company Backgrounds

  - [Jason recently moved from Bardeen to GrowthX.ai, leading go-to-market strategy](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai positions as a growth agency, focusing on content creation and marketing automation](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [James runs his own agency, specializing in social media content creation and management](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Content Creation Processes and Tools

  - [James uses CastMagic.io for content ideation from audio/video transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating strong hooks for social media posts (90% of effort)](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Discussion of various social media scheduling tools (Assembly, Aware)](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Concern about LinkedIn's crackdown on automation tools](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

### Potential Collaboration Structure

  - [GrowthX.ai interested in creating content for internal team and clients](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Possibility of splitting services between multiple team members (e.g., Marcel and Jason)](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [James offers flexible communication and casual working relationship](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Social Media Strategies and Challenges

  - [Focus on creating content that demonstrates real work/value, not just "rage bait"](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Challenge of maintaining consistent posting schedules for busy executives](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Importance of repurposing existing content (e.g., blog posts to social media)](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

### Pricing and Packages

  - [Half plan: 10 posts/month for $2,000](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Full plan: 20 posts/month for $3,000](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Open to customization based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to discuss internally with Marcel about potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Jason to determine desired post volume and team members involved](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [James to send Slack connect invitation for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Potential setup of a two-month pilot program to test the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/x1Eckn_Y-g1it29LRXv7jFEsfj6pFgxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

action_items.description: Chat w/ Marcel re potentially using James' agency services for LinkedIn posting
Set up Slack channel w/ Jason, send invite via LinkedIn
